oracleRecoveryReadback.metricSourceDisposition: desktop sidebar, header, search rest, and search expanded metrics are retained only after the owner-approved restoration re-expresses the pre-d1d1291 Storybook documentation shell through current Storybook-owned doc-shell selectors and committed proof receipts.
